query:
-- Add new columns to partners table for the new tier/commission model
ALTER TABLE partners 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS subscriptionFee DECIMAL(8,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS commissionRate DECIMAL(5,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.4000,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS monthlyCommissionCap DECIMAL(10,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS monthlyCommissionEarned DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isExempt BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE;

-- Update existing partners: set Scout defaults (free tier, 40% keep, $500 cap)
UPDATE partners SET 
  tier = 'scout',
  subscriptionFee = 0.00,
  commissionRate = 0.4000,
  monthlyCommissionCap = 500.00,
  monthlyCommissionEarned = 0.00,
  isExempt = FALSE
WHERE tier IN ('bronze', 'scout') OR tier IS NULL;

-- Update silver partners to Pro tier
UPDATE partners SET 
  tier = 'pro',
  subscriptionFee = 29.00,
  commissionRate = 0.5500,
  monthlyCommissionCap = NULL
WHERE tier = 'silver';

-- Update gold partners to Crew tier
UPDATE partners SET 
  tier = 'crew',
  subscriptionFee = 79.00,
  commissionRate = 0.6500,
  monthlyCommissionCap = NULL
WHERE tier = 'gold';
